alerts.title: Modified: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. This technical regulation specifies mandatory expiration dates for food products.

alerts.title: Modified: Japan Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required against Specifications and Standards. These standards are under The Food Sanitation Act.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Food (general standards for contaminants)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required against Specifications and Standards. These standards are under The Food Sanitation Act.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Radioactivity
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required for handling and limits. Relates to the accident at the Fukushima Nuclear Power Plant.

alerts.title: Modified: Singapore Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required for specific limits depending on the additive and food product type.. New: Must comply with regulatory limits. Limits vary by additive and food type; verification is required using SFA's Guidance Information on Requirements for Use of Food Additives.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Food products containing non-permitted additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Do not import or sell. An application can be submitted to SFA to evaluate the use of a non-permitted additive.

alerts.title: Modified: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (incidental constituents)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Must be within SFA’s regulatory limits. Verification required against relevant SFA documents.. New: Must be within SFA’s regulatory limits. All food businesses must comply.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Food or food products containing contaminants exceeding regulatory limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Do not import or sell.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - All ingredients and additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared in the list of ingredients on food labels. Applies to prepacked foods for sale in Singapore.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Food or food product
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must comply with labelling requirements.

alerts.title: Modified: Taiwan Allergen List - Crustacean shellfish, mango, peanuts, sesame seeds, milk and goat milk, eggs, tree nuts, gluten-containing cereals, soybeans, fish
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Mandatory declaration if present as ingredient or food additive. New: Mandatory declaration if present as ingredient or food additive. These allergens require mandatory labeling for prepackaged foods if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Sulphite (as residue sulphur dioxide)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 10 or more. Mandatory labeling if residue sulphur dioxide is 10 mg/kg or more in prepackaged foods.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Contaminant Limits - Risk from Mad Cow Disease
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibition/Restriction. Specific regulations regarding the import of food with risk from mad cow disease must be verified.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Labelling Requirement - Prohibited Foods
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibition. A list of foods prohibited from production, import, or sale must be verified.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Delisted color additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Not allowed for use in food (21 CFR 81.10 and/or 81.30). Verification required.. These are labeled as 'DELISTED'.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Additive Limits - Prohibited substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited from use. New: Prohibited from use in food (21 CFR Part 189). Verification required.. These are listed in FDA regulations as 'PROHIBITED' or 'PROHIBITED WITH EXCEPTIONS'.

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. The nine major food allergens are milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, and sesame. Excludes meat, poultry, egg products, alcoholic beverages, raw agricultural commodities, highly refined oils, drugs, cosmetics, and most foods sold at retail or food service establishments that are not pre-packaged with a label.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - 3-Monochloropropane-1,2-Diol (3-MCPD)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 1. This is a Guidance Level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. This is an Action Level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Poisonous or deleterious substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required against the Chemical Contaminants Transparency Tool, guidance documents, and regulations (21 CFR parts 109 and 509). Includes tolerances, action levels, guidance levels, derived intervention levels, recommended maximum levels, and advisory levels. Users are responsible for staying informed about changes.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Allergen preventive controls
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. Facilities must put written procedures in place to control allergen cross-contact and ensure accurate allergen labeling, as per the CGMP & PC rule (21 CFR part 117).

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Cochineal extract and carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. Identified as allergenic substances derived from insects.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. The food source of a major food allergen must appear in parentheses following the ingredient name OR immediately after or next to the list of ingredients in a 'contains' statement. Specific type of tree nut, fish species, and Crustacean shellfish species must be declared. Excludes meat, poultry, egg products, alcoholic beverages, raw agricultural commodities, highly refined oils, drugs, cosmetics, and most foods sold at retail or food service establishments that are not pre-packaged with a label.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. Required to be identified on labels for consumers sensitive to the dye.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Gluten-free claim
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must meet a defined standard for gluten content. Compliance requirements for fermented and hydrolyzed foods also apply.. Helps consumers with celiac disease.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Sulfiting agents (e.g., sodium bisulfite)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: ≥10. Must be declared on food labels when present at or above the specified concentration due to adverse reactions in sensitive individuals (e.g., asthma).

alerts.title: Added: China Additive Limits - Food Additive Limits
alerts.details: New: Verification of relevant GB Food Safety Standards is required.. The National Health Commission is responsible for the development and supervision of national food safety standards (GB Standards). Specific additive limits must be verified against the latest GB standards.

alerts.title: Added: China Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required per GB 2760-2015. This standard specifies the principles for the use of food additives, the varieties, scope of use, and maximum usage levels or residue levels of food additives. Specific limits must be verified against the full text of GB 2760-2015.

alerts.title: Added: China Allergen List - Allergen Declaration
alerts.details: New: Verification of relevant GB Food Safety Standards is required.. The National Health Commission is responsible for the development and supervision of national food safety standards (GB Standards). Specific allergen declaration requirements must be verified against the latest GB standards.

alerts.title: Added: China Contaminant Limits - Contaminant Limits
alerts.details: New: Verification of relevant GB Food Safety Standards is required.. The National Health Commission is responsible for the development and supervision of national food safety standards (GB Standards). Specific contaminant limits must be verified against the latest GB standards.

alerts.title: Added: China Labelling Requirement - Labelling Requirements
alerts.details: New: Verification of relevant GB Food Safety Standards is required.. The National Health Commission is responsible for the development and supervision of national food safety standards (GB Standards). Specific labelling requirements must be verified against the latest GB standards.

alerts.title: Added: China Microbiology Limits - Microbiology Limits
alerts.details: New: Verification of relevant GB Food Safety Standards is required.. The National Health Commission is responsible for the development and supervision of national food safety standards (GB Standards). Specific microbiology limits must be verified against the latest GB standards.

alerts.title: Added: China Salt / Sodium Limits - Salt / Sodium Limits
alerts.details: New: Verification of relevant GB Food Safety Standards is required.. The National Health Commission is responsible for the development and supervision of national food safety standards (GB Standards). Specific salt/sodium limits must be verified against the latest GB standards.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required via GSFA Online Database. The Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA, Codex STAN 192-1995) sets forth the conditions under which permitted food additives may be used in all foods. Users are encouraged to consult the database and its Preamble.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants
alerts.details: New: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995). Codex establishes maximum levels (MLs) and guideline levels for contaminants in food and feed. These levels are the maximum concentration legally permitted.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins
alerts.details: New: Follow Code of Practice for the Prevention and Reduction of Mycotoxins in Spices (CXC 78-2017). This Code of Practice provides guidance for the prevention and reduction of mycotoxin contamination specifically in spices.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.details: Old: Manual review required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. The database provides information on approved food additives and their conditions of use, based on Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii), their toxins and metabolites (e.g., staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005 lays down food safety criteria for relevant foodborne bacteria, their toxins and metabolites in specific foods, and process hygiene criteria.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Food safety criteria for bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes)
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Listeria monocytogenes sampling in processing areas and equipment
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Listeria monocytogenes shelf-life studies
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Process hygiene criteria
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Salmonella control programmes (equivalence recognition)
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Salmonella prevalence (special guarantees for Sweden, Finland, Norway)
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements for prepackaged foodstuffs
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation specifies general labelling requirements for all prepackaged foodstuffs, including seasoning and snack products.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Mandatory shelf life declaration for food products
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation specifies mandatory shelf life periods for food products, which must be declared on the label.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Optional shelf life declaration for food products
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This standard specifies optional shelf life periods for food products, which, if used, must be declared on the label.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements for pre-packaged foodstuffs
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General requirements for unprocessed genetically modified agricultural products
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Guidelines for optional shelf life periods for food products
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Mandatory shelf life periods for food products
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Modified: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. This technical regulation specifies general requirements for the labeling of prepackaged food stuffs, which would include allergen declarations and warnings.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Data label requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - General requirements for GM products
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - General requirements for Halal food
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Quantity declaration
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Modified: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological limits
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. This technical regulation specifies microbiological limits for foodstuffs intended for human consumption and for food ingredients used in the food industry.

alerts.title: Removed: India Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required as per FSSAI regulations.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: India Labelling Requirement - General Labelling and Display
alerts.details: Old: Verification required as per FSSAI regulations.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Modified: Indonesia Additive Limits - Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. Specific provisions for production, import, registration, and circulation of Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O) as a food additive must be verified.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Additive Limits - All Food Additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Allergen List - Allergen Declaration
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Contaminant Limits - All Contaminants
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Export Certificate Issuance Procedures
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Procedures for obtaining export certificates for processed foods must be followed, which may include specific labelling and documentation requirements.

alerts.title: Modified: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Food Category Classification
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. Food products must be classified according to the official food categories defined by BPOM, which impacts the application of other regulations and labelling.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Online Sales and Marketing Supervision
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific regulations apply to the supervision of processed foods circulated (sold/marketed) online, potentially including information disclosure requirements.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Additive Limits - Specifications and Standards for Food and Food Additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Modified: Japan Contaminant Limits - Agricultural Chemical Residues
alerts.details: Old: Verification required under the Positive List System. New: Verification required against the Positive List System.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Bovine Spongiform Encephalopathy (BSE)

alerts.title: Modified: Japan Labelling Requirement - Food Produced by Recombinant DNA Techniques
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required for specific regulations.

alerts.title: Modified: Japan Labelling Requirement - Health Claims, Special Dietary Uses, Nutrition Labeling
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required against MHLW regulations.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Microbiology Limits - Compositional Standards
alerts.details: New: Verification required against Ministerial Ordinance. Specific to milk and milk products, compositional standards may include microbiological and other limits.
